basic_details.short_information: Before diving into the details, here is a snapshot of all essential information about this EPI job notification so you can quickly assess whether this opportunity is right for you.

age_limit.details: EPI follows Presidential Directives on age relaxation for reserved category candidates applying against reserved posts. Candidates from SC/ST/OBC applying against unreserved posts will not receive any age relaxation. | Category Age Relaxation SC / ST 5 years (for reserved posts) OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years (for reserved posts) Persons with Disabilities (PWD) 10 years UR candidates applying against UR posts No relaxation

qualification.details: Each post carries specific educational and professional experience requirements. Read the details for your target role carefully, since 54.9% will not be rounded up to 55% and teaching/freelancing experience is explicitly excluded. | Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC in last/current organisation must be at least ₹3,60,000 per annum. Required: Hands-on site construction experience in Civil/Structural works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Experience in PEB structures, piling works, and quality assurance. Age Limit: 32 years as on the last date of application. | Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Electrical Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC must be at least ₹3,60,000 per annum. Required: Site construction experience in LT/HT Electrical works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Experience in erection, testing, and commissioning of HT/LT Switchgears, Transformers, cables, Motors, and Compact Sub-stations. Age Limit: 32 years as on the last date of application. | Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Mechanical Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC must be at least ₹3,60,000 per annum. Required: Site construction experience in Mechanical works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Erection, testing, and commissioning of mechanical static/rotary equipment; piping works (process/raw water/treated/cooling water). Age Limit: 32 years as on the last date of application. | Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 9 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC in last/current organisation must be at least ₹7,20,000 per annum. Required: Extensive site construction experience in Civil/Structural works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Experience in PEB structures, piling works, and quality assurance. Age Limit: 42 years as on the last date of application. | Important note on experience: Teaching, training, consultancy, and freelancing experience will NOT be counted as relevant experience for any post.

salary_details.details: EPI's fixed term contract positions come with competitive monthly remuneration, statutory benefits, and performance-linked increments. Here is a complete picture of the compensation structure. | E-1 Grade (Assistant Manager): ₹40,000 per month + House Rent Allowance E-4 Grade (Senior Manager): ₹70,000 per month + House Rent Allowance HRA: Applicable as per regular EPI employee norms based on the place of posting. North East Location Allowance: An additional 10% of fixed remuneration for postings in North East India. Provident Fund: As per the Employees Provident Fund Act, 1952. Medical Insurance: Self-medical insurance coverage with reimbursement of premium up to ₹3,000 per annum. Gratuity: Admissible as applicable. Annual Increment: 3% per year on completion of each year of service, subject to satisfactory performance. Contract Period: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance and organisational requirements. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: EPI uses a merit-based shortlisting process to filter applicants before calling them for interview. Understanding this process helps you assess your competitive standing before applying.

Candidates are shortlisted based on percentage of marks in the required qualification and post-qualification experience. Fraction of percentage is ignored - 54.9% is treated as less than 55% and will lead to rejection. If applications are high in volume

EPI may conduct a Written Test before the interview stage. The shortlist will be published on the EPI website; selected candidates will also be informed by email. The final list of selected candidates will be hosted on the EPI website after the interview. Interview venue: Western Regional Office (WRO)
Mumbai. No TA/DA is admissible for attending the interview.
how_to_apply: All applications must be submitted exclusively through the EPI official website. Applications sent by email or post will not be accepted. Follow each step carefully - no modifications are allowed after final submission.
Visit the official website: Go to www.epi.gov.in and navigate to HRD – Current Openings.
Register yourself: Create a new account with a valid and active email ID that you will monitor throughout the selection process.

Keep documents ready before filling the form: Passport-size colour photograph and signature - JPEG format, maximum 60 KB each. Date of birth, contact and address details, category (UR/OBC/SC/ST/EWS/PWD). Educational details: year of passing, percentage of marks (or equivalent percentage for CGPA). Professional details: company name, duration, post held, area of work, pay scale, and salary details.
Passport-size colour photograph and signature - JPEG format, maximum 60 KB each.
Date of birth, contact and address details, category (UR/OBC/SC/ST/EWS/PWD).
Educational details: year of passing, percentage of marks (or equivalent percentage for CGPA).
Professional details: company name, duration, post held, area of work, pay scale, and salary details.
Fill the application form carefully: Double-check all entries before submission. No changes are allowed after final submission.

Submit and send documents by email: After submitting the online form, send the system-generated application along with scanned copies of qualification, experience, and salary documents to [email protected].
Print confirmation page: Take a printout of the application confirmation page for future reference.
Official Application Portal: www.epi.gov.in (HRD – Current Openings) Document Email: [email protected] Queries: [email protected] | Phone: 011-24361666
important_instructions: If your degree certificate shows CGPA instead of percentage, EPI has specific conversion norms you must follow when filling your application form.

If the university provides a conversion formula: Use the university's own conversion and obtain a certificate from the university confirming the equivalent percentage. Submit this certificate at the time of interview. If the university does not provide a conversion formula: A minimum CGPA of 6 on a 10-point scale will be treated as equivalent to 60%. For scales other than 10-point, the score will be prorated accordingly.

content_sections.heading: EPI Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview
content_sections.text: Before diving into the details, here is a snapshot of all essential information about this EPI job notification so you can quickly assess whether this opportunity is right for you.

rows.engineering_projects_india_ltd_epi: Fixed Term Contract (initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years)
Asst. Manager – Civil, Electrical, Mechanical; Senior Manager – Civil

content_sections.heading: About Engineering Projects (India) Limited
content_sections.text: Understanding the employer is key before applying. EPI is a Central Government enterprise with a strong track record in executing large-scale infrastructure and industrial projects across India. Engineering Projects (India) Ltd. is a Mini Ratna Category-I CPSE under the Ministry of Heavy Industries. EPI undertakes turnkey project execution across Power, Steel, Industrial, Civil, and Infrastructure sectors. With decades of experience in multi-faceted project delivery, EPI is known for large-scale industrial construction and erection works. Professionals joining EPI work on challenging and technically demanding projects across different Indian states, making it a rewarding career destination for engineers in the infrastructure and construction domain. Download EPI Assistant Manager, Senior Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Direct Link to Apply EPI Assistant Manager, Senior Manager Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: Post-Wise Vacancy Details - EPI Advt. No. HRM/REC/04/2026
content_sections.text: EPI has announced vacancies across four distinct engineering roles spread over two pay grades. The table below gives a comprehensive break-up by post, vacancies, reservation, location, qualification, experience, and age limit.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria - Qualification & Experience Required
content_sections.text: Each post carries specific educational and professional experience requirements. Read the details for your target role carefully, since 54.9% will not be rounded up to 55% and teaching/freelancing experience is explicitly excluded. Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC in last/current organisation must be at least ₹3,60,000 per annum. Required: Hands-on site construction experience in Civil/Structural works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Experience in PEB structures, piling works, and quality assurance. Age Limit: 32 years as on the last date of application. Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Electrical Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC must be at least ₹3,60,000 per annum. Required: Site construction experience in LT/HT Electrical works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Experience in erection, testing, and commissioning of HT/LT Switchgears, Transformers, cables, Motors, and Compact Sub-stations. Age Limit: 32 years as on the last date of application. Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Mechanical Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC must be at least ₹3,60,000 per annum. Required: Site construction experience in Mechanical works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Erection, testing, and commissioning of mechanical static/rotary equipment; piping works (process/raw water/treated/cooling water). Age Limit: 32 years as on the last date of application. Education: B.E. / B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Civil Engineering with a minimum of 55% marks. Experience: Minimum 9 years post-qualification executive experience. Gross annual CTC in last/current organisation must be at least ₹7,20,000 per annum. Required: Extensive site construction experience in Civil/Structural works - Residential, Institutional, or Industrial projects. Preferred: Experience in PEB structures, piling works, and quality assurance. Age Limit: 42 years as on the last date of application. Important note on experience: Teaching, training, consultancy, and freelancing experience will NOT be counted as relevant experience for any post.

content_sections.heading: Salary, Benefits & Contract Terms
content_sections.text: EPI's fixed term contract positions come with competitive monthly remuneration, statutory benefits, and performance-linked increments. Here is a complete picture of the compensation structure. E-1 Grade (Assistant Manager): ₹40,000 per month + House Rent Allowance E-4 Grade (Senior Manager): ₹70,000 per month + House Rent Allowance HRA: Applicable as per regular EPI employee norms based on the place of posting. North East Location Allowance: An additional 10% of fixed remuneration for postings in North East India. Provident Fund: As per the Employees Provident Fund Act, 1952. Medical Insurance: Self-medical insurance coverage with reimbursement of premium up to ₹3,000 per annum. Gratuity: Admissible as applicable. Annual Increment: 3% per year on completion of each year of service, subject to satisfactory performance. Contract Period: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance and organisational requirements. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Age Relaxation Policy
content_sections.text: EPI follows Presidential Directives on age relaxation for reserved category candidates applying against reserved posts. Candidates from SC/ST/OBC applying against unreserved posts will not receive any age relaxation.

rows.category: UR candidates applying against UR posts

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for EPI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: All applications must be submitted exclusively through the EPI official website. Applications sent by email or post will not be accepted. Follow each step carefully - no modifications are allowed after final submission. Visit the official website: Go to www.epi.gov.in and navigate to HRD – Current Openings . Register yourself: Create a new account with a valid and active email ID that you will monitor throughout the selection process. Keep documents ready before filling the form: Passport-size colour photograph and signature - JPEG format, maximum 60 KB each. Date of birth, contact and address details, category (UR/OBC/SC/ST/EWS/PWD). Educational details: year of passing, percentage of marks (or equivalent percentage for CGPA). Professional details: company name, duration, post held, area of work, pay scale, and salary details. Fill the application form carefully: Double-check all entries before submission. No changes are allowed after final submission. Submit and send documents by email: After submitting the online form, send the system-generated application along with scanned copies of qualification, experience, and salary documents to [email protected] . Print confirmation page: Take a printout of the application confirmation page for future reference. Official Application Portal: www.epi.gov.in (HRD – Current Openings) Document Email: [email protected] Queries: [email protected] | Phone: 011-24361666

content_sections.heading: Shortlisting & Selection Process
content_sections.text: EPI uses a merit-based shortlisting process to filter applicants before calling them for interview. Understanding this process helps you assess your competitive standing before applying. Candidates are shortlisted based on percentage of marks in the required qualification and post-qualification experience . Fraction of percentage is ignored - 54.9% is treated as less than 55% and will lead to rejection. If applications are high in volume, EPI may conduct a Written Test before the interview stage. The shortlist will be published on the EPI website; selected candidates will also be informed by email. The final list of selected candidates will be hosted on the EPI website after the interview. Interview venue: Western Regional Office (WRO), Mumbai . No TA/DA is admissible for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required at the Time of Interview
content_sections.text: All shortlisted candidates must carry originals along with one set of self-attested photocopies of the following documents on the day of interview. Failing to produce any required document will result in the interview not being conducted. System-generated application form (printed). Updated Resume / Bio-data with academic and professional details. Mark sheets and pass certificates for Class 10, Class 12, Graduation, Post-Graduation (if any). Matriculation / Secondary certificate as proof of date of birth. All post-qualification experience documents - joining letter, relieving letter, experience certificates, salary slips (last 3 months mandatory), Form-16, or any employer-issued salary certificate. Proof of gross drawn remuneration for a minimum of one year (bank statement, Form-16, or salary certificate). Caste/Category certificate: SC/ST/OBC (NCL)/EWS/PWD certificate as applicable from competent authority. OBC (NCL) certificate must not be older than 6 months; EWS certificate must not be older than 1 year from the date of application. Valid photo ID proof - Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, or Indian Passport. One recent passport-size colour photograph. Daily Current Affairs 24 June 2026: Download Free PDF Now

content_sections.heading: CGPA to Percentage Conversion - EPI's Official Rules
content_sections.text: If your degree certificate shows CGPA instead of percentage, EPI has specific conversion norms you must follow when filling your application form. If the university provides a conversion formula: Use the university's own conversion and obtain a certificate from the university confirming the equivalent percentage. Submit this certificate at the time of interview. If the university does not provide a conversion formula: A minimum CGPA of 6 on a 10-point scale will be treated as equivalent to 60%. For scales other than 10-point, the score will be prorated accordingly.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for EPI Recruitment 2026 is 3 July 2026 at 5:30 PM. Applications submitted after this time will not be considered under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under EPI Advt. HRM/REC/04/2026?
faq.answer: EPI has announced a total of 14 vacancies - 9 for Assistant Manager (Civil), 1 for Assistant Manager (Electrical), 2 for Assistant Manager (Mechanical), and 2 for Senior Manager (Civil).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Assistant Manager in EPI?
faq.answer: Assistant Managers at E-1 grade in EPI receive a fixed consolidated remuneration of ₹40,000 per month plus applicable House Rent Allowance. An annual increment of 3% is also provided subject to satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Senior Manager – Civil in EPI?
faq.answer: Senior Manager (Civil) at E-4 grade receives ₹70,000 per month plus applicable House Rent Allowance, with an annual increment of 3% on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q5. Is EPI hiring on a permanent or contract basis?
faq.answer: EPI is hiring on a Fixed Term Contract basis - initially for one year, which is extendable up to a maximum of three years based on performance and organisational requirements. This is not a permanent government job.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum experience required to apply for EPI Assistant Manager?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of post-qualification executive experience with a gross annual remuneration of at least ₹3,60,000 in their last or current organisation. Teaching, training, consultancy, and freelancing do not count as valid experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum experience for EPI Senior Manager (Civil)?
faq.answer: The Senior Manager (Civil) post requires a minimum of 9 years of post-qualification executive experience, and the gross annual remuneration in the last or current organisation should not be less than ₹7,20,000.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the interview for EPI Recruitment 2026 be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted at EPI's Western Regional Office (WRO) in Mumbai. The exact date and time will be communicated to shortlisted candidates by email. No TA/DA is provided for attending the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Can OBC or SC/ST candidates apply for unreserved posts in EPI?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC-NCL) can apply against unreserved (UR) posts. However, no age relaxation will be extended to them when applying against unreserved posts.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any written test for EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A written test is not mandatory but may be conducted at EPI's discretion if the number of applications received is large. Candidates will then be called for interview based on their written test performance.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for EPI Recruitment 2026 is 3 July 2026 at 5:30 PM. Applications submitted after this time will not be considered under any circumstances.
